verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me : Sume tibi librum grandem, et scribe in eo stylo hominis : Velociter spolia detrahe, cito prædare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י קַח־לְךָ֖ גִּלָּי֣וֹן גָּד֑וֹל וּכְתֹ֤ב עָלָיו֙ בְּחֶ֣רֶט אֱנ֔וֹשׁ לְמַהֵ֥ר שָׁלָ֖ל חָ֥שׁ בַּֽז׃
verses.king_james: Moreover the Lord said unto me, Take thee a great roll, and write in it with a man’s pen concerning Maher–shalal–hash–baz.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adhibui mihi testes fideles, Uriam sacerdotem, et Zachariam, filium Barachiæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָעִ֣ידָה לִּ֔י עֵדִ֖ים נֶאֱמָנִ֑ים אֵ֚ת אוּרִיָּ֣ה הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְאֶת־זְכַרְיָ֖הוּ בֶּ֥ן יְבֶרֶכְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: And I took unto me faithful witnesses to record, Uriah the priest, and Zechariah the son of Jeberechiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: et accessi ad prophetissam, et concepit, et peperit filium. Et dixit Dominus ad me : Voca nomen ejus : Accelera spolia detrahere ; Festina prædari :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָֽאֶקְרַב֙ אֶל־הַנְּבִיאָ֔ה וַתַּ֖הַר וַתֵּ֣לֶד בֵּ֑ן {ס} וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י קְרָ֣א שְׁמ֔וֹ מַהֵ֥ר שָׁלָ֖ל חָ֥שׁ בַּֽז׃
verses.king_james: And I went unto the prophetess; and she conceived, and bare a son. Then said the Lord to me, Call his name Maher–shalal–hash–baz.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia antequam sciat puer vocare patrem suum et matrem suam, auferetur fortitudo Damasci, et spolia Samariæ, coram rege Assyriorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֗י בְּטֶ֙רֶם֙ יֵדַ֣ע הַנַּ֔עַר קְרֹ֖א אָבִ֣י וְאִמִּ֑י יִשָּׂ֣א ׀ אֶת־חֵ֣יל דַּמֶּ֗שֶׂק וְאֵת֙ שְׁלַ֣ל שֹׁמְר֔וֹן לִפְנֵ֖י מֶ֥לֶךְ אַשּֽׁוּר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For before the child shall have knowledge to cry, My father, and my mother, the riches of Damascus and the spoil of Samaria shall be taken away before the king of Assyria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adjecit Dominus loqui ad me adhuc, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣סֶף יְהֹוָ֔ה דַּבֵּ֥ר אֵלַ֛י ע֖וֹד לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: The Lord spake also unto me again, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro eo quod abjecit populus iste  aquas Siloë, quæ vadunt cum silentio,  et assumpsit magis Rasin,  et filium Romeliæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗עַן כִּ֤י מָאַס֙ הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֔ה אֵ֚ת מֵ֣י הַשִּׁלֹ֔חַ הַהֹלְכִ֖ים לְאַ֑ט וּמְשׂ֥וֹשׂ אֶת־רְצִ֖ין וּבֶן־רְמַלְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Forasmuch as this people refuseth the waters of Shiloah that go softly, and rejoice in Rezin and Remaliah’s son;

verses.latin_vulgate: propter hoc ecce Dominus adducet super eos  aquas fluminis fortes et multas,  regem Assyriorum, et omnem gloriam ejus,  et ascendet super omnes rivos ejus,  et fluet super universas ripas ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָכֵ֡ן הִנֵּ֣ה אֲדֹנָי֩ מַעֲלֶ֨ה עֲלֵיהֶ֜ם אֶת־מֵ֣י הַנָּהָ֗ר הָעֲצוּמִים֙ וְהָ֣רַבִּ֔ים אֶת־מֶ֥לֶךְ אַשּׁ֖וּר וְאֶת־כׇּל־כְּבוֹד֑וֹ וְעָלָה֙ עַל־כׇּל־אֲפִיקָ֔יו וְהָלַ֖ךְ עַל־כׇּל־גְּדוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Now therefore, behold, the Lord bringeth up upon them the waters of the river, strong and many, even the king of Assyria, and all his glory: and he shall come up over all his channels, and go over all his banks:

verses.latin_vulgate: et ibit per Judam, inundans, et transiens :  usque ad collum veniet.  Et erit extensio alarum ejus  implens latitudinem terræ tuæ, o Emmanuel !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָלַ֤ף בִּֽיהוּדָה֙ שָׁטַ֣ף וְעָבַ֔ר עַד־צַוָּ֖אר יַגִּ֑יעַ וְהָיָה֙ מֻטּ֣וֹת כְּנָפָ֔יו מְלֹ֥א רֹחַב־אַרְצְךָ֖ עִמָּ֥נוּ אֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he shall pass through Judah; he shall overflow and go over, he shall reach even to the neck; and the stretching out of his wings shall fill the breadth of thy land, O Immanuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregamini, populi, et vincimini ;  et audite, universæ procul terræ :  confortamini, et vincimini ;  accingite vos, et vincimini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹ֤עוּ עַמִּים֙ וָחֹ֔תּוּ וְהַֽאֲזִ֔ינוּ כֹּ֖ל מֶרְחַקֵּי־אָ֑רֶץ הִתְאַזְּר֣וּ וָחֹ֔תּוּ הִֽתְאַזְּר֖וּ וָחֹֽתּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Associate yourselves, O ye people, and ye shall be broken in pieces; and give ear, all ye of far countries: gird yourselves, and ye shall be broken in pieces; gird yourselves, and ye shall be broken in pieces.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inite consilium, et dissipabitur ;  loquimini verbum, et non fiet :  quia nobiscum Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֻ֥צוּ עֵצָ֖ה וְתֻפָ֑ר דַּבְּר֤וּ דָבָר֙ וְלֹ֣א יָק֔וּם כִּ֥י עִמָּ֖נוּ אֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Take counsel together, and it shall come to nought; speak the word, and it shall not stand: for God is with us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc enim ait Dominus ad me : Sicut in manu forti erudivit me,  ne irem in via populi hujus, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ כֹ֨ה אָמַ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֵלַ֖י כְּחֶזְקַ֣ת הַיָּ֑ד וְיִסְּרֵ֕נִי מִלֶּ֛כֶת בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ הָֽעָם־הַזֶּ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord spake thus to me with a strong hand, and instructed me that I should not walk in the way of this people, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Non dicatis : Conjuratio ;  omnia enim quæ loquitur populus iste, conjuratio est :  et timorem ejus ne timeatis, neque paveatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־תֹאמְר֣וּן קֶ֔שֶׁר לְכֹ֧ל אֲשֶׁר־יֹאמַ֛ר הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּ֖ה קָ֑שֶׁר וְאֶת־מוֹרָא֥וֹ לֹא־תִֽירְא֖וּ וְלֹ֥א תַעֲרִֽיצוּ׃
verses.king_james: Say ye not, A confederacy, to all them to whom this people shall say, A confederacy; neither fear ye their fear, nor be afraid.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominum exercituum ipsum sanctificate ;  ipse pavor vester, et ipse terror vester :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת אֹת֣וֹ תַקְדִּ֑ישׁוּ וְה֥וּא מוֹרַאֲכֶ֖ם וְה֥וּא מַעֲרִֽצְכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Sanctify the Lord of hosts himself; and let him be your fear, and let him be your dread.

verses.latin_vulgate: et erit vobis in sanctificationem ;  in lapidem autem offensionis, et in petram scandali,  duabus domibus Israël ;  in laqueum et in ruinam habitantibus Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֖ה לְמִקְדָּ֑שׁ וּלְאֶ֣בֶן נֶ֠גֶף וּלְצ֨וּר מִכְשׁ֜וֹל לִשְׁנֵ֨י בָתֵּ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לְפַ֣ח וּלְמוֹקֵ֔שׁ לְיוֹשֵׁ֖ב יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: And he shall be for a sanctuary; but for a stone of stumbling and for a rock of offence to both the houses of Israel, for a gin and for a snare to the inhabitants of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et offendent ex eis plurimi,  et cadent, et conterentur,  et irretientur, et capientur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכָ֥שְׁלוּ בָ֖ם רַבִּ֑ים וְנָפְל֣וּ וְנִשְׁבָּ֔רוּ וְנוֹקְשׁ֖וּ וְנִלְכָּֽדוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And many among them shall stumble, and fall, and be broken, and be snared, and be taken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Liga testimonium,  signa legem in discipulis meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צ֖וֹר תְּעוּדָ֑ה חֲת֥וֹם תּוֹרָ֖ה בְּלִמֻּדָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Bind up the testimony, seal the law among my disciples.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exspectabo Dominum qui abscondit faciem suam  a domo Jacob, et præstolabor eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחִכִּ֙יתִי֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה הַמַּסְתִּ֥יר פָּנָ֖יו מִבֵּ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְקִוֵּ֖יתִי־לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And I will wait upon the Lord, that hideth his face from the house of Jacob, and I will look for him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego et pueri mei quos dedit mihi Dominus  in signum, et in portentum Israël  a Domino exercituum,  qui habitat in monte Sion :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה אָנֹכִ֗י וְהַיְלָדִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָתַן־לִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה לְאֹת֥וֹת וּלְמוֹפְתִ֖ים בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מֵעִם֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת הַשֹּׁכֵ֖ן בְּהַ֥ר צִיּֽוֹן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Behold, I and the children whom the Lord hath given me are for signs and for wonders in Israel from the Lord of hosts, which dwelleth in mount Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: et cum dixerint ad vos :  Quærite a pythonibus  et a divinis qui strident in incantationibus suis :  numquid non populus a Deo suo requiret,  pro vivis a mortuis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִֽי־יֹאמְר֣וּ אֲלֵיכֶ֗ם דִּרְשׁ֤וּ אֶל־הָֽאֹבוֹת֙ וְאֶל־הַיִּדְּעֹנִ֔ים הַֽמְצַפְצְפִ֖ים וְהַמַּהְגִּ֑ים הֲלוֹא־עַם֙ אֶל־אֱלֹהָ֣יו יִדְרֹ֔שׁ בְּעַ֥ד הַחַיִּ֖ים אֶל־הַמֵּתִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And when they shall say unto you, Seek unto them that have familiar spirits, and unto wizards that peep, and that mutter: should not a people seek unto their God? for the living to the dead?

verses.latin_vulgate: ad legem magis et ad testimonium.  Quod si non dixerint juxta verbum hoc,  non erit eis matutina lux.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְתוֹרָ֖ה וְלִתְעוּדָ֑ה אִם־לֹ֤א יֹֽאמְרוּ֙ כַּדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֵֽין־ל֖וֹ שָֽׁחַר׃
verses.king_james: To the law and to the testimony: if they speak not according to this word, it is because there is no light in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et transibit per eam, corruet, et esuriet ;  et cum esurierit, irascetur.  Et maledicet regi suo, et Deo suo,  et suscipiet sursum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָ֥בַר בָּ֖הּ נִקְשֶׁ֣ה וְרָעֵ֑ב וְהָיָ֨ה כִֽי־יִרְעַ֜ב וְהִתְקַצַּ֗ף וְקִלֵּ֧ל בְּמַלְכּ֛וֹ וּבֵאלֹהָ֖יו וּפָנָ֥ה לְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.king_james: And they shall pass through it, hardly bestead and hungry: and it shall come to pass, that when they shall be hungry, they shall fret themselves, and curse their king and their God, and look upward.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ad terram intuebitur ;  et ecce tribulatio et tenebræ,  dissolutio et angustia,  et caligo persequens,  et non poterit avolare de angustia sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶל־אֶ֖רֶץ יַבִּ֑יט וְהִנֵּ֨ה צָרָ֤ה וַֽחֲשֵׁכָה֙ מְע֣וּף צוּקָ֔ה וַאֲפֵלָ֖ה מְנֻדָּֽח׃
verses.king_james: And they shall look unto the earth; and behold trouble and darkness, dimness of anguish; and they shall be driven to darkness.
